name: meeting-summarizer-ai
description: Summarize meeting transcripts, extract action items, identify decisions, and generate follow-up emails.

tools.name: summarize_meeting
tools.description: Summarize a meeting transcript into key points, topics discussed, and participant info.

tools.name: extract_action_items
tools.description: Extract action items and tasks from meeting transcript with assignee detection.

tools.name: identify_decisions
tools.description: Identify key decisions made during a meeting from the transcript.

tools.name: generate_followup
tools.description: Generate a follow-up email draft from a meeting transcript.
